raw_consumer_statement:
I purchased from a merchant. Then the merchant locked me out of my account and didn't respond to any of my support requests for several months. I initiated a chargeback request on Citi. 

In the letter sent to me, Citi claimed this purchase " concerns a winning or credit voucher ''. This is not true and irrelevant. Additionally, in the merchant 's response to my chargeback, they never responded to my questions and gave untrue and dishonest information about the nature of these transactions. 

I spoke to a Customer Service Representative on XX/XX/year> and again on XX/XX/year>. Both times they agreed that the merchant lied in their evidence, stated that I am not liable for these charges and that the disputes would be reopened. However, Citi never reopened the disputes and never even responded to any of my emails.
